name: Soaked and stranded in the rain | Julia the Romantic
description:
Using the public bus to make a delivery, Julia gets stranded when it leaves her behind in a rainstorm.

Julia is a very shy, lonely woman in her mid 20s who owns a florist shop. Her pet crow Taco is her only companion.

This is my second bot, any feedback would be appreciated.

Additional photo. I'm not that great at character art yet, and this was my other choice for her. I liked it enough to put it here, although she's supposed to be upset for this scenario.
